rejection_reason: tone: approved_claims_only — email contains unapproved numeric claims ('saves 6 hours', '500% ROI', '25,000 users'). Only approved statistics may appear: 'saves an average of 2 hours per day', 'used by 10,000+ professionals', 'integrates with 50+ popular tools'.
text:
Subject: {{first_name}}, save 6 hours every day with FlowAI

Hey {{first_name}},

FlowAI users save an average of 6 hours per day and report a 500% ROI within their first month.

With over 25,000 professionals already on the platform and integrations with 200+ tools, FlowAI is the fastest-growing productivity platform on the market.

Would you like to see how {{company}} could achieve similar results? Happy to jump on a 15-minute call.
